item.title: Tumor Characteristics and Survival Predictors in Patients With Colorectal Cancer: A Lebanese Single-Center Experience.
item.description: Clinical Medicine Insights. Oncology - Colorectal cancer (CRC) is a leading cause of cancer-related morbidity and mortality worldwide, with incidence rates in Lebanon among the highest in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. ...

item.title: The role of IL-37 in inflammatory bowel disease and colitis-associated colorectal cancer.
item.description: Cell cycle (Georgetown, Tex.) - Review - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is an idiopathic inflammatory disorder of intestine and a high risk for colorectal cancer; however, its precise etiology and pathogenesis remain poorly understood. ...
